ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Actual winner the dark edge was not in model's ranked horses. Model focused too heavily on pre-race favorites. Top prediction was Talakan with 35.0% confidence.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Talakan > Wilstar, but actual result was The Dark Edge > Just Four Fame. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Actual winner not found in market analysis. Market dynamics shifted unexpectedly from pre-race state.
